deviations.what: showClearIcon (since UI5 1.94) on three inputs is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.94 to render it.
the two formattedValueStateText aggregations (a FormattedText carrying Links, since UI5 1.78) are newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.78 to render them.

the Links' press (.onFormattedTextLinkPress) round-trips as event LINK_PRESS and shows the controller's toast text; the original docks the MessageToast at CenterCenter and calls preventDefault - not expressible via message_toast_display, the toast appears at the default position.
